scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! May I see your passport and booking confirmation?
Do you have a seat preference? Window or aisle?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석 선호가 있으신가요? 창가 아니면 통로?

choices.text: I want to sit on the wing.

scenes.npcDialog: How many bags are you checking in today?

choices.text: I want to check in myself.

scenes.npcDialog: Please place your laptop and liquids in a separate tray.
Please step aside. Do you have anything metal in your pockets?

choices.text: Oh, I forgot my belt. Let me remove it.
I might have some coins. Here they are.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: I'm looking for my gate. It's gate 25.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to see anything in particular?
We're now boarding rows 20 to 35. May I see your boarding pass?
Can I help you find your seat?
Let me help you with your bag. Is this your carry-on?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가방 넣는 것 도와드릴게요. 이게 기내용 가방인가요?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink? We have juice, water, coffee, and tea.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 음료는 뭘로 드릴까요? 주스, 물, 커피, 차가 있습니다.

scenes.npcDialog: For your meal, would you like beef or chicken?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 식사로 소고기와 닭고기 중 뭘로 드릴까요?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else I can get for you?

choices.text: Could I get a blanket, please?
I want to sleep in first class.

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, the seatbelt sign is on. Could you wait a moment?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 죄송합니다, 안전벨트 사인이 켜져있어요. 잠시 기다려주시겠어요?

choices.text: Okay, I'll go back to my seat.
I don't care about the sign.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help filling out the arrival card?

choices.text: Yes, what should I write for 'purpose of visit'?
Where do I write my hotel address?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like headphones for the entertainment system?

choices.text: That would be great, thank you.

scenes.npcDialog: Please return to your seat and fasten your seatbelt. We're experiencing turbulence.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석으로 돌아가 안전벨트를 매주세요. 난기류가 있습니다.

choices.text: Okay, I'll sit down right away.
Is it going to be a rough ride?

scenes.npcDialog: We'll be landing in 30 minutes. Please put your tray table up and seat in the upright position.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 30분 후 착륙합니다. 테이블을 접고 좌석을 바로 세워주세요.

choices.text: Okay, thank you for letting me know.

scenes.situation: 유럽 최대 허브 공항 중 하나인 프랑크푸르트에 도착했다. 효율적인 독일 시스템.
scenes.npcDialog: Willkommen! Welcome to Frankfurt. Your connecting flight to Amsterdam is in Terminal 1, Gate B. You have 2 hours - follow the signs.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 빌코멘! 프랑크푸르트에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 암스테르담 연결편은 터미널 1, 게이트 B예요. 2시간 있어요 - 표지판 따라가세요.

choices.text: Danke! Is 2 hours enough time if I want to grab something to eat?
Thank you! How long is the walk to Gate B?
Why only 2 hours? That's too short.

choices.feedback: 프랑크푸르트 공항은 표지판이 잘 되어 있습니다.

scenes.situation: 짧은 환승 시간이지만 독일 맥주를 맛보고 싶다.
scenes.npcDialog: German beer before your flight? We have Weissbier, Pilsner, Dunkel. Brezel - pretzel - goes perfect with beer!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비행 전에 독일 맥주요? 바이스비어, 필스너, 둔켈 있어요. 브레첼 - 프레첼 - 맥주랑 완벽해요!

choices.text: I'll try a small Weissbier and a pretzel. Prost!
choices.feedback: 독일 맥주 문화를 경험하며 건배를 외칩니다.

choices.text: What's the difference between these beers?
choices.feedback: 맥주 종류에 대해 물어보는 것이 좋습니다.

scenes.situation: 암스테르담행 비행기 탑승. 짧은 유럽 내 비행이다.
scenes.npcDialog: Boarding for Amsterdam. Flight time only 50 minutes. Auf Wiedersehen! Have a good stay in the Netherlands!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 암스테르담행 탑승입니다. 비행 시간 50분밖에 안 돼요. 아우프 비더제헨! 네덜란드에서 좋은 시간 보내세요!

choices.text: Danke schön! Such a short flight - I'll barely sit down!
choices.feedback: 짧은 비행에 대한 재치 있는 코멘트입니다.

choices.text: Only 50 minutes? That's quick! Auf Wiedersehen!
50 minutes? Why did I have to transfer then?
choices.feedback: 직항이 없거나 비용 문제일 수 있습니다.

scenes.npcDialog: What is the purpose of your visit?
How long will you be staying?

choices.text: I'll be here for two weeks.

scenes.npcDialog: Where will you be staying?

choices.text: I'm staying at the Hilton Hotel.
At a hotel in the city center.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have a return ticket?

choices.text: Yes, I'm flying back on the 15th.

scenes.npcDialog: Which carousel is your luggage on?

choices.text: I'm not sure. My flight was from Seoul.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there a problem with your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, my bag hasn't come out yet.
I can't find my suitcase. It's a black one.

scenes.npcDialog: How much would you like to exchange?

choices.text: Can I exchange 300 dollars to euros?

scenes.npcDialog: Today's rate is 1.08 euros per dollar. Is that okay?
How can I help you today?

choices.text: How do I get to the city center?
What's the best way to get downtown?

scenes.npcDialog: Where would you like to go?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a ticket to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, I have a reservation under Kim.
Yes, I booked online. Here's my confirmation.
No, but give me the best room.

scenes.npcDialog: Your room includes breakfast. It's served from 7 to 10 AM.

choices.text: Great, where is the breakfast room?
Perfect, thank you for the information.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need?

choices.text: Could you tell me the WiFi password?

scenes.npcDialog: CN Tower was world's tallest for 34 years! Glass floor at 342m, EdgeWalk outside at 356m. Brave enough for the walk?
scenes.npcDialogKo: CN 타워는 34년간 세계 최고층이었어요! 342m에 유리 바닥, 356m에 엣지워크 외부 산책. 걸을 용기 있으세요?

choices.text: I'll try the glass floor first!

scenes.npcDialog: Little Italy on College Street is authentic! Fresh pasta, wood-fired pizza, gelato. Patio season is the best time to visit!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 콜리지 스트리트 리틀 이탈리아는 정통이에요! 신선한 파스타, 화덕 피자, 젤라토. 파티오 시즌이 방문 최적기예요!

choices.text: Patio dining in Little Italy sounds perfect!
Fresh pasta and gelato - yes please!
I can get Italian food anywhere.

scenes.npcDialog: Ripley's Aquarium has Canada's largest underwater tunnel! Sharks swim right over you. The jellyfish exhibit is hypnotic!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 리플리 수족관에 캐나다 최대 수중 터널이 있어요! 상어가 바로 위로 수영해요. 해파리 전시가 최면 걸려요!

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you?

choices.text: I'm looking for work. Are you hiring?
Do you have any job openings?
I don't really want to work.

scenes.npcDialog: The bond is 4 weeks' rent. Any questions?

choices.text: When do I get it back?
Is it refundable if I leave early?

scenes.npcDialog: So you're leaving us. When's your last day?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 그럼 그만두시는 거군요. 마지막 날이 언제예요?

choices.text: In two weeks. I'll finish all my duties.
I'm giving 2 weeks' notice as required.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! You booked a 6-bed dorm, right? Here's your locker key.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 6인실 도미토리 예약하셨죠? 여기 락커 키입니다.

choices.text: Yes, that's correct. Where is my bed?
I want a private room now.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help with the bus?

choices.text: Which bus goes to the old town?
How much is the bus fare?

scenes.npcDialog: Niagara Falls is 90 minutes from Toronto! Hornblower boat gets you soaking wet. Canadian side has the best views of all three falls!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 나이아가라 폭포는 토론토에서 90분이에요! 혼블로워 보트 타면 흠뻑 젖어요. 캐나다 쪽에서 세 폭포 다 제일 잘 보여요!

choices.text: Getting soaked by the falls sounds fun!
Canadian side is the best? Good choice!

scenes.npcDialog: Toronto Islands are 15 minutes by ferry! Car-free oasis with skyline views. Rent bikes, have a picnic, best city escape!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 토론토 아일랜드는 페리로 15분이에요! 차 없는 오아시스에 스카이라인 뷰. 자전거 빌리고, 피크닉하고, 최고의 도시 탈출!

choices.text: 15 minutes to a car-free island? Perfect!
Skyline views from the island sound amazing.

scenes.npcDialog: Greektown on the Danforth is authentic! Souvlaki, gyros, saganaki cheese on fire. Taste of the Danforth festival is legendary!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 다나포스 그릭타운은 정통이에요! 수블라키, 기로스, 불붙은 사가나키 치즈. 다나포스 맛 축제가 전설이에요!

choices.text: Cheese on fire? That's a show!
Ethnic neighborhoods all seem the same.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you here about the job posting?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to submit my resume.
I brought my CV. Who should I give it to?

scenes.npcDialog: Bills are not included in the rent.

choices.text: What bills do I need to pay separately?

scenes.npcDialog: Need help shipping your belongings home?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 짐 본국으로 배송하는 거 도움 필요하세요?

choices.text: Yes, how much for 2 boxes to Korea?

scenes.npcDialog: The shared kitchen is on the first floor. Do you have any questions?

choices.text: Can I store food in the fridge?
What time does the kitchen close?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you looking for something?

choices.text: Is the museum within walking distance?
How long does it take to walk there?

scenes.npcDialog: Kensington Market is Toronto's bohemian heart! Vintage shops, global foods, street art. Pedestrian Sundays in summer are magical!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 켄싱턴 마켓은 토론토의 보헤미안 심장이에요! 빈티지 샵, 세계 음식, 거리 예술. 여름 보행자 일요일이 마법이에요!

choices.text: Global foods in one place? Perfect!

scenes.npcDialog: Eaton Centre is downtown's mega mall! Glass galleria inspired by Milan. Over 250 stores - you could spend all day here!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 이튼 센터는 다운타운 메가 쇼핑몰이에요! 밀라노에서 영감받은 유리 갤러리아. 250개 넘는 매장 - 하루 종일 있을 수 있어요!

scenes.npcDialog: Aga Khan Museum has stunning Islamic art! The building by Fumihiko Maki is a masterpiece. The gardens are for peaceful reflection.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 아가 칸 박물관에 놀라운 이슬람 예술이 있어요! 후미히코 마키가 설계한 건물이 걸작이에요. 정원은 평화로운 성찰을 위해 있어요.

choices.text: The architecture alone is worth visiting.
Islamic art is so intricate and beautiful.
I'm not interested in religious art.

scenes.npcDialog: Thanks for coming in. Tell me about yourself.

choices.text: I'm from Korea and I'm on a working holiday visa.
I have experience in customer service.
I don't like talking about myself.
What do you want to know?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to set up home internet?

choices.text: How fast is your standard plan?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need before you go?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가기 전에 더 필요한 거 있으세요?

choices.text: Could you write me a reference letter?
May I use you as a reference for future jobs?
You have to write me a good review.

scenes.npcDialog: Is this your first time at a hostel?

choices.text: Yes, where are the shared bathrooms?
Where can I take a shower?

scenes.npcDialog: We have a free walking tour starting at 10 AM. Interested?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오전 10시에 무료 워킹투어가 있어요. 관심 있으세요?

choices.text: Yes! How long is the tour?
If it's free, it's probably bad.

scenes.npcDialog: St. Lawrence Market was named world's best food market! The peameal bacon sandwich is Toronto's signature. Saturday farmers market since 1803!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 세인트 로렌스 마켓은 세계 최고의 식품 시장으로 뽑혔어요! 피밀 베이컨 샌드위치가 토론토 대표예요. 1803년부터 토요 파머스 마켓!

choices.text: World's best food market? High expectations!
I must try the peameal bacon sandwich!

scenes.npcDialog: Toronto's Chinatown is massive! Dim sum, herbalists, karaoke. Spadina and Dundas intersection is the heart - so vibrant!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 토론토 차이나타운은 거대해요! 딤섬, 한의원, 노래방. 스파다이나와 던다스 교차로가 중심이에요 - 정말 활기차요!

choices.text: I want to try authentic dim sum.

scenes.npcDialog: King West is Toronto's party district! Rooftop bars, dance clubs, celebrity sightings during TIFF. Dress to impress!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 킹 웨스트는 토론토 파티 지역이에요! 루프탑 바, 댄스 클럽, TIFF 때 셀럽 목격. 멋지게 입으세요!

choices.text: I'll dress up for King West!

scenes.npcDialog: What hours are you available to work?

choices.text: I'm flexible. I can work weekends too.
I prefer mornings, but I can adjust.
I only work 2 hours a day.

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for something specific?

choices.text: I need a cheap bed and desk.

scenes.npcDialog: We'll miss you! When are you leaving?

choices.text: Next week. Thank you for everything!
I'll really miss you all. Let's keep in touch!

scenes.npcDialog: Your ticket includes only cabin baggage. Do you have checked luggage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 티켓에는 기내 수하물만 포함되어 있어요. 위탁 수하물 있으세요?

choices.text: How much extra for checked baggage?
I only have carry-on, so I'm fine.

scenes.npcDialog: Cooking tonight? There's a supermarket around the corner.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오늘 저녁 요리하세요? 코너 돌면 슈퍼마켓 있어요.

choices.text: Great! Do they have fresh vegetables?
Cooking is a waste of time.

scenes.npcDialog: Rogers Centre has a retractable roof! Blue Jays games are a Toronto tradition. Get a beer and hot dog - classic ballpark experience!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 로저스 센터는 개폐식 지붕이 있어요! 블루제이스 경기는 토론토 전통이에요. 맥주와 핫도그 사세요 - 클래식 야구장 경험!

choices.text: Baseball with beer and hot dogs - perfect!

scenes.npcDialog: Queen West is Toronto's coolest strip! Independent boutiques, vintage stores, street art. Graffiti Alley is a must-see!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 퀸 웨스트는 토론토에서 가장 쿨한 거리예요! 독립 부티크, 빈티지 숍, 거리 예술. 그래피티 앨리 꼭 가세요!

scenes.npcDialog: St. Lawrence is where Toronto began! Historic buildings, the Flatiron, covered market. Sunday antique market is treasure hunting!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 세인트 로렌스는 토론토가 시작된 곳이에요! 역사적 건물, 플랫아이언, 실내 마켓. 일요일 골동품 시장은 보물찾기예요!

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any questions about the position?
Are you interested in this item?

choices.text: Yes, can I see it in person first?

scenes.npcDialog: What can I get for you?

choices.text: One kebab, please. How much is it?
What's the cheapest thing on the menu?
Is this food safe to eat?

scenes.npcDialog: Regular admission is 15 euros.

choices.text: Do you have any free admission days?

scenes.npcDialog: ROM is Canada's largest museum! The crystal addition is striking. Dinosaurs, ancient Egypt, Indigenous art - all under one roof!
scenes.npcDialogKo: ROM은 캐나다 최대 박물관이에요! 크리스탈 증축이 인상적이에요. 공룡, 고대 이집트, 원주민 예술 - 한 지붕 아래 다 있어요!

scenes.npcDialog: Toronto's Koreatown is on Bloor West! 24-hour BBQ, karaoke, fried chicken and beer - chimaek is huge here!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 토론토 코리아타운은 블루어 웨스트에 있어요! 24시간 BBQ, 노래방, 치킨과 맥주 - 치맥이 여기서 대세예요!

choices.text: Chimaek is always a good choice!
I can get Korean food back home.

scenes.situation: 제라드 인디아 바자에서 인도 음식을 먹는다
scenes.npcDialog: Gerrard India Bazaar is authentic! Biryanis, samosas, chai. Sari shops and Bollywood music - you'll feel like you're in Delhi!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 제라드 인디아 바자는 정통이에요! 비리야니, 사모사, 차이. 사리 가게와 볼리우드 음악 - 델리에 온 느낌이 들 거예요!

scenes.npcDialog: Are you here to register for tax?

choices.text: Yes, I just started working. What do I need?
How do I get a tax file number?
I don't want to pay taxes.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you registering as a new patient?

choices.text: Yes, I just moved here. What documents do I need?
Do you accept my working holiday insurance?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Would you like a meal or just a sandwich?

choices.text: How much is the value meal?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for luggage storage?

choices.text: Yes, how much for a small locker?
I'll just leave it on the floor.

scenes.situation: 빅토리아 시대 산업 건물이 변신한 예술 지구를 방문한다
scenes.npcDialog: Distillery District is beautifully preserved Victorian industrial! Art galleries, craft breweries, no cars allowed. The Christmas market is famous!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 디스틸러리 디스트릭트는 빅토리아 시대 산업 건물이 아름답게 보존됐어요! 아트 갤러리, 크래프트 브루어리, 차 없어요. 크리스마스 마켓 유명해요!

choices.text: Craft breweries in old factories? Love it!

scenes.npcDialog: High Park has a free zoo! Cherry blossoms in spring rival DC. The llamas and capybaras are surprisingly popular with kids!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 하이 파크에 무료 동물원이 있어요! 봄 벚꽃은 DC에 필적해요. 라마와 카피바라가 아이들에게 인기예요!

choices.text: Free zoo with capybaras? So cute!
Cherry blossoms rivaling DC sounds beautiful.

scenes.npcDialog: What type of account would you like to open?

choices.text: A basic checking account for my salary.
I need an account to receive my wages.
Just put cash in my hand.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you today?

choices.text: I'd like to apply for a visa extension.
What are the requirements for extending my visa?

scenes.npcDialog: Will that be all?

choices.text: Yes, and can you heat this up for me?
Do you have any meal deals?
This is too expensive for a convenience store.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with anything?

choices.text: I just want WiFi, no food.

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for a long-term rental?

choices.text: Yes, I'll be here for about a year.
I want a mansion for cheap.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you filing for a tax return?

choices.text: Yes, I'm leaving the country soon.
How do I claim my tax back?
Give me all my money back.

scenes.npcDialog: This souvenir is 20 euros.

choices.text: Can you give me a discount? How about 15?
Just give it to me for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Front desk, how may I help you?

choices.text: The air conditioning in my room isn't working.
I can't figure out how to adjust the temperature.

scenes.npcDialog: Housekeeping, can I help you?

choices.text: Could I get some extra towels, please?
I need more towels for my room.

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! How can I assist you today?

choices.text: Could I get a late checkout?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you checking out today?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to check out.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to store your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, I'll pick it up around 3 PM.
That would be great. My flight is this evening.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Table for how many?
Are you ready to order?

choices.text: Yes, I'll have the pasta, please.
Could I have a few more minutes?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink?

choices.text: I'll have a glass of water, please.
Could I see the wine list?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any food allergies?
Can I get you anything else?
How would you like to pay?

choices.text: Can I pay with credit card?

scenes.npcDialog: Where to?

choices.text: Can you take me to this address?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 25 euros.

choices.text: Here you go. Keep the change.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a day pass?
I want to ride for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with directions?

choices.text: Does this bus go to the museum?
Which bus goes to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, are you lost?

choices.text: Yes, I'm looking for the train station.
Could you tell me how to get to the museum?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Where are you flying to today?

choices.text: I don't want to go home.

scenes.npcDialog: Last minute shopping? Can I help you find something?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 쇼핑하세요? 뭔가 찾는 거 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I'm looking for some chocolate as a gift.
Do you have any local souvenirs?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need a customs declaration form?

choices.text: Yes, please. What do I need to declare?
Do I need to declare gifts I bought?
